markets.question: New Rihanna Album before GTA VI?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Rihanna officially releases a new album before Grand Theft Auto VI is officially released in the US. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

If neither occurs by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to 50-50.

For the purposes of this market, "release" refers to the game becoming publicly available for purchase or download in the US. Early access, beta versions, other forms of pre-release availability, or leaks will not count as an official release. If the release is only for certain consoles (e.g. Xbox Series X/S) it will count.

The resolution source for the release of GTA VI is official information from Rockstar Games or its parent company, Take-Two Interactive.

Officially released means that a newly released album is officially available for download or streaming (not including live events) by the resolution date.

Re-releases, deluxe editions, compilations, or greatest hits albums will not count, unless they contain at least 50% tracks that have never been officially released in any format prior to the album's release.

The resolution source for the album release will be any official streaming or download site, e.g. Apple Music or Spotify.

events.title: What will happen before GTA VI?
events.description: This is a market on predicting events that will occur before the release of Grand Theft Auto VI.

eventMetadata.context_description: Rockstar Games’ decision to delay Grand Theft Auto VI until November 19, 2026, following an earlier shift from Fall 2025 to May 2026, has lengthened the window for competing cultural and tech milestones. This extended timeline boosts implied probabilities for music releases from high-profile artists like Rihanna and Playboi Carti, alongside rapid AI progress such as a GPT-6 launch, as traders assess streaming trends, label strategies, and development cycles. Summer 2026 marketing campaigns for GTA VI, including potential new trailers, could heighten visibility and indirectly influence sentiment around what unfolds first. Historical patterns show Rockstar prioritizing polish over speed, leaving room for external entertainment and industry shifts to resolve ahead of the Vice City debut.

markets.question: Will Harvey Weinstein be sentenced to no prison time?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the prison sentence, if any, imposed on Harvey Weinstein as part of his ongoing New York retrial (People of the State of New York v. Harvey Weinstein) by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET.

This market will resolve immediately based on the first sentence rendered in this case, regardless of any appeals. If Weinstein is found not guilty, there is a mistrial, or if the first sentencing does not include any jail or prison time, this market will resolve to "No Prison Time."

If no sentencing takes place by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will also resolve to "No Prison Time."

If the sentence falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

For the purposes of this market, it does not matter whether the sentence is concurrent or consecutive to any existing sentence Weinstein is already serving. The market will resolve based on the total prison sentence imposed in this case.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the New York court system or other involved U.S. government sources; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Recent developments in Harvey Weinstein's New York retrial, including the May 2026 mistrial on the remaining rape charge after a prior mixed 2025 verdict and the 2020 conviction's overturn on evidentiary grounds, have driven trader consensus toward "No Prison Time" as the leading outcome. The 74-year-old former producer has already served over six years amid appeals and a separate 16-year California sentence for sexual assault, with defense efforts exploring concurrent pleas that could limit further incarceration. Industry observers note how repeated jury deadlocks and procedural challenges have weakened momentum for additional convictions, while his advanced age and documented health concerns add uncertainty to any extended sentencing timeline. Upcoming resolution steps, such as potential plea negotiations or a fourth proceeding, remain key swing factors in the closely watched case.

events.title: 2026 NHL Stanley Cup Champion
events.description: This market is to predict the winner of the 2025–26 NHL Stanley Cup championship.

eventMetadata.context_description: Carolina Hurricanes and Vegas Golden Knights lead 2026 Stanley Cup futures at 48.5% and 39.5% implied probability as they hold series advantages in the conference finals. Carolina posted the East’s top record with 113 points and has advanced despite dropping an early game to Montreal, reflecting trader confidence in its depth and playoff experience. Vegas built a 3-0 Western Conference final lead over the regular-season-leading Avalanche after strong goaltending and timely scoring, shifting sentiment away from Colorado’s earlier dominance. Montreal’s surprise run to the East final accounts for its 7.6% share, while the Avalanche’s 5.1% reflects mounting elimination pressure after consecutive losses. These probabilities capture recent playoff momentum and roster health heading into decisive games.

Carolina posted the East’s top record with 113 points and has advanced despite dropping an early game to Montreal, reflecting trader confidence in its depth and playoff experience. Vegas built a 3-0 Western Conference final lead over the regular-season-leading Avalanche after strong goaltending and timely scoring, shifting sentiment away from Colorado’s earlier dominance. Montreal’s surprise run to the East final accounts for its 7.6% share, while the Avalanche’s 5.1% reflects mounting elimination pressure after consecutive losses. These probabilities capture recent playoff momentum and roster health heading into decisive games.

markets.question: Will Spain win the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the national team that wins the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

If at any point it becomes impossible for this team to win the FIFA World Cup based on the rules of FIFA (e.g., they are eliminated in the knockout stage), this market will resolve immediately to “No”.

If the 2026 FIFA World Cup is permanently canceled or has not been completed by October 13, 2026, 11:59 PM this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from FIFA, however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

CCP General Secretary Xi Jinping will be considered removed from power if he announces his resignation from his role as General Secretary, or is otherwise dismissed, detained, disqualified, or otherwise loses his position or is prevented from fulfilling his duties as General Secretary within this market's timeframe.

The primary resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible reporting.

events.title: Xi Jinping out before 2027?
events.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if China's General Secretary of the Communist Party, Xi Jinping, is removed from power for any length of time between July 3, 2025, and December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

CCP General Secretary Xi Jinping will be considered removed from power if he announces his resignation from his role as General Secretary, or is otherwise dismissed, detained, disqualified, or otherwise loses his position or is prevented from fulfilling his duties as General Secretary within this market's timeframe.

The primary resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible reporting.

eventMetadata.context_description: Xi Jinping’s consolidated authority within the Chinese Communist Party, reinforced by the removal of presidential term limits in 2018 and repeated leadership purges that have elevated loyalists across the Politburo, Central Military Commission, and state institutions, underpins the 93% trader consensus against his removal before the end of 2026. In recent months, Xi has maintained a high public profile through addresses on the 15th Five-Year Plan, energy security initiatives, and bilateral diplomacy, including engagements with foreign counterparts, with no reported health issues or elite challenges emerging ahead of the 21st Party Congress scheduled for late 2027. Ongoing anti-corruption actions in the military have further centralized decision-making without visible factional resistance or an anointed successor. While sudden health events, unexpected scandals, or internal elite realignments could still shift dynamics, current institutional and personnel structures show no near-term transition pressures within the market’s resolution window.

markets.question: Will Gavin Newsom win the 2028 Democratic presidential nomination?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the named individual wins and accepts the 2028 nomination of the Democratic Party for U.S. president. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of official Democratic Party sources.

Any replacement of the democratic nominee before election day will not change the resolution of the market.

eventMetadata.context_description: The 2028 Democratic presidential nomination contest features a fragmented field without an obvious frontrunner after the prior cycle. Gavin Newsom leads trader pricing through his position as California governor, national fundraising reach, and executive record on state-level policy. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez draws support from the progressive wing, Kamala Harris retains residual name recognition from her recent nomination, and figures such as Jon Ossoff and Josh Shapiro reflect Senate and gubernatorial profiles from competitive states. Differentiation rests on ideological positioning, geographic bases, and institutional ties, with potential consolidation driven by early primary results, donor patterns, or party endorsements ahead of the first contests.

Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez draws support from the progressive wing, Kamala Harris retains residual name recognition from her recent nomination, and figures such as Jon Ossoff and Josh Shapiro reflect Senate and gubernatorial profiles from competitive states. Differentiation rests on ideological positioning, geographic bases, and institutional ties, with potential consolidation driven by early primary results, donor patterns, or party endorsements ahead of the first contests.

markets.question: Will Jared Polis win the 2028 Democratic presidential nomination?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the named individual wins and accepts the 2028 nomination of the Democratic Party for U.S. president. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of official Democratic Party sources.

Any replacement of the democratic nominee before election day will not change the resolution of the market.
